mapper.insert: /* oms-order-b2bObOrderBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpB2bObOrderIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_B2B_ORDER ( OWKEY , REQORDERNO , SHMISTNO , B2BOBNO , B2BOBCNFRMDAY , FROMCTKEY , TOCTKEY , REQORDERTYPE , ICKEY , B2BOBQTY , DLVYBOXNO , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , B.REQORDERNO , B.SHMISTNO , B.OBNO , B.OBCNFRMDAY , B.FROMCTKEY , B.TOCTKEY , B.ORDERTYPE , B.ICKEY , B.FROMCTQTY , B.DLVYBOXNO , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_B2BOBORDER_BATCH B LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_B2B_ORDER O ON B.REQORDERNO = O.REQORDERNO AND B.SHMISTNO = O.SHMISTNO WHERE B.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND O.OWKEY IS NULL
mapper.select: /* oms-order-b2bObOrderBatch-sql-oracle.xml - getB2bObOrderInfo */ SELECT SH.OWKEY , SH.CTKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , BA.ICKEY , SUM(BA.FROMCTQTY) AS QTY , #{trnId} as TRNID FROM TORDER_EAI_B2BOBORDER_BATCH BA INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON BA.REQORDERNO = SH.ORGORDERKEY WHERE BA.TRN_ID = #{trnId} GROUP BY SH.CTKEY , SH.OWKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , BA.ICKEY
